equity.equityReportingNote: Equity figures from 2026-05-30 onward include full holdings value. Historical equity prior to 2026-05-30 was understated due to cash-only reporting bug, now fixed.

history.equityReportingNote: endingEquity for runs prior to 2026-05-30 reflects cash balance only due to reporting bug. Actual equity was higher while positions were open. Bug fixed in paperTradeExecutor.js and equityBuilder.js on 2026-05-30.

disclaimers: Paper simulation only. No real-money trading.
Fake positions, fake trades, fake P&L.
Real Alpaca IEX market data used for paper simulation inputs.
Not financial advice. Not verified investment performance.
Public paper trial for research and education purposes only.
Historical equity numbers prior to 2026-05-30 were understated due to cash-only reporting bug, now fixed.
